title: Unicorn Green
description: 3 sets × 5 over-unders [2min @85%, 1min @106%] — harder overs at Z5

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 70%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/30. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 30. Target: 85% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/30. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is brutal. You chose brutal. Now finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: target 106%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more. Then one more. That's how champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1 of 3. The suffering is progressive, like the tax system.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 85% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target: 106% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Lock in and execute.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 26 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 85% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 85%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 85% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 85%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 8/30 — hold 106% FTP at 85-95 rpm. Seated. 1320s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is THE rep that makes you faster. The one where most people quit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This interval is dedicated to whoever said 'it doesn't get easier, you just go faster.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 85% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 9/30. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/30. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 106% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your competition is resting. You're getting faster. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your FTP called. It wants to know why you're trying to destroy it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Focus on form. Seated at 85-95 rpm. Power will follow.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep into the workout now. Stay present. One interval at a time.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 13/30. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 13. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 85%, Cadence: 82-90 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 2. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 55 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 16 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where average athletes quit. You're not average. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 82-90 rpm. Focus on smooth circles, not stomping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.
